client_updates.highlight: Lodestar: FCR deployed to test fleet and RC; public release + blog post expected this week or early next week
Lighthouse: investigating likely regression causing reversions to finality; test coverage needed for this case
Lodestar passing FCR spec tests for Gloas since alpha.11 (chat)
Grandine: metrics PR awaiting maintainer review; blocked on Samas or another core maintainer to merge

testing_progress.highlight: New consensus-specs PR enables FCR tests for loss/hazard cases and disables BLS for stable, fork-independent shuffling
Edge case tests in progress; PR expected tomorrow — will complete initial FCR test suite

api_and_metrics.highlight: beacon-APIs PR #616 (adds current_slot to event stream) merged
beacon-metrics PR #22 (FCR metrics) approved; awaiting merge from Panda/Barnabas
Lodestar internal metric shows 3 FCR resets in last 7 days on Nico's node; cause uninvestigated

research_updates.highlight: FCR research paper publication expected this week; no blockers identified
EL 'safe' block tag discussion: introducing a new fast-confirm tag would require hard fork coordination between CL and EL; deferred until after Glamsterdam

action_items.action: Reach out to Panda/Barnabas to merge beacon-metrics PR #22
Investigate cause of 3 FCR resets on Lodestar node; add debug logging for fallback-to-finality events
Investigate current usage of the EL 'safe' block tag by RPC providers

decisions.decision: EL block tag for FCR will reuse 'safe'; introducing a new tag requires hard fork coordination and is deferred until after Glamsterdam

targets.target: Lodestar public FCR release — this week or start of next week
FCR edge case tests PR — tomorrow (June 24, 2026)
FCR research paper publication — this week
